name: Icewear Vezzo
description: '''Chivez Smith''' (born October 31, 1989), known professionally as '''Icewear Vezzo''', is an American rapper from [[Detroit]], Michigan. He is best known for his ''Clarity'' mixtape series and his ''Rich Off Pints'' mixtape trilogy, with the latter entering the [[Heatseekers Albums]] chart. He is noted as a prominent figure of the [[Michigan rap|Detroit hip hop]] scene.
